data.title: Cardio Diagnostics Holdings to hold investor call on 2/19/2026 at 3pm CT.
data.description: Cardio Diagnostics is set to hold an investor conference call on February 19, 2026, at 3 p.m. CT in Chicago.

data.title: CCA named Jean Ann and Barry C. McCarthy recipients of 2026 Bishop’s Award for 2 decades of charity work; gala on Feb 21 at Georgia Aquarium.
data.description: In Atlanta, Catholic Charities announced Jean Ann and Barry C. McCarthy as recipients of the 2026 Bishop’s Award for their 20-year dedication to aiding the less fortunate. The award ceremony will take place on February 21, 2026, at the Georgia Aquarium's Oceans Ballroom during the Annual Gala Soiree. This award is the highest honor given by Catholic Charities Atlanta and acknowledges outstanding contributions to the community.

data.title: Soho Square Capital's Netomnia to be acquired by InfraVia, Liberty Global, and Telefónica through nexfibre joint venture.
data.description: Soho Square Capital has confirmed that Netomnia, a portfolio company, is set to be acquired by InfraVia, Liberty Global, and Telefónica. This acquisition agreement marks a significant development within the industry.
U.S. HOUSE SET TO CONSIDER AVIATION SAFETY LEGISLATION NEXT WEEK AFTER 2025 FATAL COLLISION

data.title: Alcoa stock rises as it modernizes mining approvals in Australia to enhance sustainability and environmental practices.
data.description: Alcoa's shares have risen on Wednesday as the company announced plans to modernize its mining approvals framework in Australia. The agreement with the Australian Federal Government involves a Strategic Assessment for mining areas until 2045 to assess environmental impacts and improve operational clarity. Alcoa will operate at Huntly and Willowdale mines during the assessment with a National Interest Exemption. The company aims to enhance sustainability practices and maintain its position in the aluminum market through this initiative. Alcoa plans to limit clearing to 800 hectares annually and increase rehabilitation efforts to 1,000 hectares by 2027, showing its commitment to environmental sustainability.

data.title: HF Sinclair stock drops 14% as CEO Tim Go takes leave. Franklin Myers appointed interim CEO. Q4 earnings: $221M net income. Audit review ongoing.
data.description: HF Sinclair Corp. (NYSE: DINO) experienced a significant drop in stock price after CEO Tim Go took a voluntary leave of absence, prompting the audit committee to review disclosure controls. Board Chair Franklin Myers has been appointed interim CEO. The stock plummeted by nearly 14% following the news. Despite this, the company's unaudited 2025 earnings were released, and the annual report is expected to be filed on schedule. The audit committee's review is stated not to impact the recently announced financial results, which revealed a positive fourth-quarter earnings rebound with adjusted net income of $221 million, $1.20 per diluted share, compared to a loss in the same period last year. Executives did not provide further details on the leadership change or review during the earnings call. Myers mentioned updates will be shared in due course.

data.title: Protectt.ai launches new version of AppProtectt in Dubai to enhance mobile app security platform. #AIRedTeaming.
data.description: In Dubai, Protectt.ai unveiled the newest iteration of AppProtectt during an event.

data.title: Winmark Corp (Nasdaq: WINA) reports year end net income of $41,654,100, up from $39,954,200 in 2024, with revenues of $86,055,700.
data.description: Winmark Corporation (Nasdaq: WINA) revealed its financial results for the year ending December 27, 2025. The company reported a net income of $41,654,100, equivalent to $11.30 per share diluted, an increase from the previous year's $39,954,200 or $10.89 per share diluted in 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2025, net income was $9,959,900, translating to $2.69 per share diluted, compared to $9,583,100 or $2.60 per share diluted in the same period the prior year. Revenues for the year ending December 27, 2025, amounted to $86,055,700, up from $81,289.

data.title: JIADE LIMITED priced $3 million registered direct offering, selling 12 million Class A shares at $0.25 each. Up to 48 million more shares available.
data.description: In Chengdu, China on February 18, 2026, JIADE LIMITED (NASDAQ: JDZG) disclosed a deal with multiple investors for the acquisition of 12,000,000 Class A ordinary shares at a price of $0.25 per share in a registered direct offering. The agreement, known as the Securities Purchase Agreement, also includes the option for investors to purchase an additional 48,000,000 shares within 30 calendar days from the Initial Closing Date. The pre-funded warrants are obtainable at the same price as the shares, excluding an exercise price of $0.0001 per share.

data.title: Global astaxanthin market expected to reach $1.6 billion by 2033 with 8.1% CAGR, driven by demand in nutraceuticals and cosmetics.
data.description: The global market for astaxanthin is experiencing significant growth due to several key factors. These include the increasing prevalence of chronic diseases, a growing demand for natural antioxidants in nutraceuticals and cosmetics, and advancements in microalgae cultivation technologies. This growth is particularly evident in locations like WILMINGTON, Del., as of Feb. 18, 2026. These trends have contributed to a rise in the market value, with figures indicating significant increases in both production and consumption of astaxanthin.

data.title: Inventor from La Verne creates FOOD PACK caddy to transport smoked meat mess-free. (LOS-451)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 18, 2026, an inventor from La Verne, California expressed their motivation for creating the FOOD PACK, aiming to revolutionize the transportation of smoked meats with minimal mess. The innovative design focuses on stabilizing the meat during transit while maintaining its optimal resting state. This invention presents a convenient solution for transporting smoked meats efficiently.

data.title: Net at Work acquires OnPar Technologies to enhance its managed services capabilities nationwide, strengthening its impact on core markets.
data.description: Net at Work has strengthened its nationwide presence by acquiring a team of Managed Services Provider (MSP) experts in key industry sectors. The acquisition bolsters the company's standing as a top technology solutions and managed services provider for small and medium-sized enterprises. The acquisition was disclosed today in New York.

data.title: AI-powered healthcare publishing platform Admanager, by Doceree, aids publishers in boosting HCP engagement and revenue.
data.description: The latest Publisher AI Suite has been designed to cater to the era of AI-driven clinical research, aiming to enhance the engagement of healthcare professionals (HCPs). This innovative suite enables healthcare publishers to establish stronger connections with HCPs, generate fresh sources of revenue, and gain precise insights into the utilization and licensing of their exclusive medical content. The announcement was made in Short Hills, New Jersey on February 18, 2026.

data.title: Founders of tech cos Rapt (Microsoft) & Krux (Salesforce) launch Kana with $15M funding to help marketing teams accelerate growth & automate admin work.
data.description: Kana, based in San Francisco, has recently secured $15 million in seed funding. This investment aims to assist marketing teams in utilizing agentic AI alongside their data to stimulate growth and enhance efficiencies throughout their operation. Kana offers a range of agents that provide marketers and media firms with customizable, non-intrusive tools for automating workflows, enhancing decision-making, and aligning with consumer behavior in the AI era. The company's emphasis on augmented intelligence also allows users to approve outputs.

data.title: Genesys makes G2's 2026 Best Software Awards for Agentic AI and Customer Service, reaching over 100 million buyers.
data.description: Genesys, a prominent global cloud company specializing in AI-Powered Experience Orchestration, was recently honored by being included in G2’s prestigious 2026 Best Software Awards. This recognition was specifically for being named the Best Agentic AI Software and Best Customer Service Software. G2, which is known as the world’s largest and most reputable software marketplace, attracts a vast audience of over 100 million buyers each year. The annual Best Software Awards by G2 provide rankings for top software companies and products globally, relying on genuine and up-to-date reviews from actual users. This achievement highlights the exceptional quality and impact of Genesys in the software industry.

data.title: Keysight introduces new scale-up validation solutions for AI data centers, addressing bandwidth, latency, and interoperability challenges.
data.description: In Santa Rosa, California, the latest validation solutions have been introduced to assist data center operators in addressing challenges related to bandwidth, latency, and interoperability. These solutions are crucial as AI infrastructure continues to expand, demanding efficient scalability.

data.title: ISG is studying AI governance service providers for GRCF to boost resilience and transparency. #BusinessWire
data.description: A study has been initiated by ISG in Stamford, Conn. focusing on providers utilizing AI for governance, risk, compliance, and fraud (GRCF) to enhance resilience and transparency. This research aims to explore the impact and effectiveness of AI implementation in these areas.

data.title: CBS and Zynga partner to bring Survivor Season 50 to fans through games like Words With Friends and Zynga Poker.
data.description: In San Mateo, California, Zynga Inc., a subsidiary of Take-Two Interactive (NASDAQ: TTWO) and a prominent player in interactive entertainment, revealed a partnership with CBS to honor the 50th season of Survivor. This collaboration will integrate the unique gameplay of the Emmy-winning reality show into five games within Zynga's collection. This season marks a milestone for Survivor as, for the first time in 25 years, fans will have a say in the game's outcome.

data.title: Airwallex partners with San Francisco Giants, becoming official jersey patch and financial software partner.
data.description: In San Francisco, the Giants have partnered with Airwallex, a prominent global financial platform, in a multi-year deal. This collaboration highlights the innovative work of both organizations on a global scale. Airwallex will feature as the official jersey patch partner for the Giants, with the logo to be displayed on team uniforms for the upcoming season. Furthermore, Airwallex will be recognized as the Giants’ Official Financial Software Partner. This alliance signifies a significant step towards global recognition for both parties in the modern business landscape.

data.title: Messagepoint introduces MARCIEAssure™, an AI-Powered QA solution for Medicare Advantage docs. Enhances QA review cycles.
data.description: A new AI-driven solution called MARCIEAssure™ has been introduced by Messagepoint in Toronto. This innovative tool aims to streamline the quality assurance review process for Medicare Advantage ANOC and EOC documents. With the use of artificial intelligence, MARCIEAssure™ automates QA review cycles, potentially reducing manual effort and improving efficiency.
